季節.mnemonics: Visualize 'keysetsu' as a key that sets the seasons.

春.mnemonics: Think of 'haru' as the sound you make when you sneeze in the spring.

秋.mnemonics: Imagine 'ah-kee' as the sound of a sigh when the leaves fall in autumn.

牛乳.mnemonics: Remember 'gyuunyuu' as 'guy in you' offering you a glass of milk.

すし.mnemonics: Surely you've eaten sushi before, right?

天ぷら.mnemonics: Imagine 'tempura' as a tempura frying in the sky.

りんご.mnemonics: Imagine a fantasticly dressed Mexican man excitedly holding an apple to the sky, shounting rrrrriiingooo!

料理.mnemonics: Think of 'ryouri' as 'ryo' asking you to try his cooking.

サッカー.mnemonics: Japanese speakers actually say soccer instead of football?

野球.mnemonics: Visualize 'yakyuu' as a yak wearing a baseball cap and playing baseball.

医者.mnemonics: Think of 'eeshah' as someone saying 'I shall' heal you like a doctor.

お金持ち.mnemonics: Imagine 'okanemochi' as someone holding a bag of money saying 'okay, no mochi' to you.

有名人.mnemonics: Visualize 'yuumeijin' as a famous person saying 'you may join' their fan club.

顔.mnemonics: Just look at those cows' sweet faces!
